testcase.name: contextLoads

error.message: JDBC exception executing SQL [select mi1_0.idmain_item,mc1_0.idmain_category,mc1_0.name,mi1_0.name,mi1_0.price from main_item mi1_0 left join main_category mc1_0 on mc1_0.idmain_category=mi1_0.main_category_idmain_category] [Unknown column 'mi1_0.price' in 'field list'] [n/a]; SQL [n/a]
